test08_k27.notes: Same task that failed with K2.6 (test06_45s). K2.7 completed successfully.

conclusion: EXCELLENT NEWS: Subagent failures are specific to K2.6, NOT all Kimi models. K2.7 handles subagents correctly. Upgrade to K2.7 for subagent workloads.
recommendation: Use K2.7 instead of K2.6 for subagent tasks. The issue appears to be fixed in the newer model.
